turns.assistantContent: The agents are failing silently. Let me try a different approach — reading each file myself and using the Edit tool directly for these simple changes. As orchestrator, I should delegate, but when agents fail repeatedly, I can make minimal targeted edits for the simplest systemic changes (adding one line to frontmatter).
